title: Cheese & Sponges
description: A Mod that adds many things to all aspects of the game(having to do with cheese & sponges).
body:
A Minecraft Mod whose focus is to add a little bit of everything which includes gear, ores, trees, biomes, animals, potions, dimensions, and more all while basing everything around two things, sponges and cheese. This mod is meant to be played in survival and requires Fabric API to run. As of now there are no plans to add version support for forge or older versions.

The main additions of this mod are the cheesysponge flowers, the ores that spawn(in all 3 vanilla dimension) as well as the sponge trees, crops, enchantments and more. With the cheesysponge you can craft armor, tools, and decorative blocks as well as tame wild cheese monsters. The mod also adds two structures which are the sky fan which is a structure with good loot but strong mobs and the run down house which also has some loot but a couple of traps to go with it.

Public discord server for this mod as well as the smp: https://discord.gg/QdtyfXHYgw
